basic_details.job_title: EdCIL Multi-Disciplinary Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 879 Speech Therapist, Clinical Psychologist and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: EdCIL (India) Ltd. (A Mini Ratna Category-I CPSE, Government of India)
basic_details.post_name: Occupational Therapist, Physiotherapist, Psychologist, Speech Therapist, Clinical Psychologist, Special Educator (Secondary Level), Special Educator (Primary Level), PMU Consultant
basic_details.short_information: EdCIL is recruiting Multidisciplinary Staff and PMU Consultants for Autism Centres across Andhra Pradesh, with the closing date 04 June 2026.

qualification.details: Candidates must possess the prescribed qualifications from Government/RCI recognized institutions and fulfil the eligibility criteria as on 30 April 2026. | Occupational Therapist (125 Posts) | Bachelor’s or Master’s Degree in Occupational Therapy from a recognized institution. Valid registration/license to practise as an Occupational Therapist in India, as per applicable state regulations. Strong clinical reasoning and problem-solving abilities, excellent communication and interpersonal skills. Ability to work independently and collaboratively within a team, with a compassionate, patient-centred approach. Experienced candidates in the relevant field will be given added advantage. | Physiotherapist (125 Posts) | Bachelor’s / Master’s Degree in Physiotherapy from a recognized institution. Valid professional registration/license. Strong clinical reasoning and communication skills, compassionate approach, ability to work independently and in a team. Experienced candidates in the relevant field will be given added advantage. | Psychologist (125 Posts) | M.A./M.Sc in Psychology from a recognized university (Clinical/Counselling/Developmental Psychology preferred). Experience in psychological assessments and behavioural therapies. Strong communication, counselling and interpersonal skills, ability to work independently and as part of a team. Experienced candidates in the relevant field will be given added advantage. | Speech Therapist (125 Posts) | Bachelor’s / Master’s Degree in Speech-Language Pathology or Audiology & Speech-Language Pathology from a recognized institution. Mandatory valid registration with the Rehabilitation Council of India (RCI). Experience working with children with Autism and developmental disorders preferred. Strong assessment, communication and interpersonal skills. Proficiency in Telugu and English (knowledge of other local languages is an added advantage). Ability to work independently and as part of a team; experienced candidates will be given added advantage. | Clinical Psychologist (125 Posts) | Post Graduation in Clinical Psychology from an institution recognized by the Rehabilitation Council of India (RCI). Mandatory valid RCI registration. Strong expertise in psychological assessments and behavioural therapies. Excellent communication and interpersonal skills; proficiency in Telugu is an added advantage. Ability to work independently and as part of a multidisciplinary team; experienced candidates will be given added advantage. | Special Educator (Secondary Level) – 125 Posts | The candidate must possess any one of the following RCI-recognised qualifications with valid CRR number: Bachelor’s Degree + B.Ed. (Special Education), OR Bachelor’s Degree + B.Ed. (General) with 1-year Diploma in Autism/Intellectual Disability, OR Bachelor’s Degree + B.Ed. (General) with D.Ed. in Autism/Intellectual Disability. Qualified AP TET (Paper-2B mandatory) / CTET in Special Education. Experienced candidates in the relevant field will be given added advantage. | Special Educator (Primary Level) – 125 Posts | Must have passed Intermediate (10+2) from a recognized Board. Must possess a two-year Diploma in Special Education (Autism/Intellectual Disability) recognized by RCI with valid CRR number. Qualified AP TET (Paper-1B mandatory) / CTET in Special Education. Experienced candidates in the relevant field will be given added advantage. | PMU Consultant (4 Posts) | Ph.D./M.Phil in Clinical Psychology/Psychology/Special Education. Desirable: Ph.D in the field of rehabilitation of Persons with Disabilities. Experienced candidates in the relevant field will be given added advantage. Expertise in report writing and strong communication skills is mandatory.

how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only; no other mode of application will be accepted.
Visit the online recruitment portal at https://tsgrecruitment.edcil.co.in/login.
Register and fill in the online application form with accurate and complete details of personal information, qualifications and experience.
Upload all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, resume and other supporting documents in PDF format only.
important_instructions: Only online applications will be accepted; only Indian Nationals are eligible. The workplace will be Autism Centres across various Municipalities of Andhra Pradesh as approved by SPD (Inclusive Education–PM SHRI, Andhra Pradesh). The competent authority reserves the right to amend, cancel or change the advertisement wholly or partly without assigning any reason. The engagement will not confer any right for regular engagement, permanent absorption or continued contractual engagement. Qualifications must be from Government recognized institutions only. Candidates should have strong verbal and written communication skills and excellent working knowledge of computers (MS Word, MS Excel, MS PowerPoint etc.) and presentation skills. Selection will be based on academic/professional qualifications and may include an interview on a prescribed date and time as decided by the competent authority. A waiting list of candidates will be prepared for possible future vacancies or non-joining of selected candidates. Original documents to prove qualifications, age, experience, etc., must be produced at the time of interview. The cut-off date for age and experience is 30 April 2026; eligibility must be satisfied as on this date. Candidates must upload all required documents (educational certificates, resume, experience certificates etc.) in PDF format only; failure will result in disqualification/rejection. Screening and shortlisting will strictly be based on details and documents provided in the online application; incomplete, false or misrepresented information will lead to disqualification. Any false declaration or suppression of information detected at any stage will lead to cancellation of candidature/termination of services and may attract disciplinary/legal action. Interview letters and related communication will be sent only to shortlisted candidates via e-mail as provided in the online application; candidates must keep their email active. Merely fulfilling eligibility criteria does not entitle a candidate to be called for interview. Engagement is purely contractual; extension of contract depends on the needs of Inclusive Education–PM SHRI, Andhra Pradesh and the performance of the professional. The last date for receipt of online applications is 04 June 2026. No application fee is required for any of the posts.
